scripts.dev: node ../../scripts/kill-port-holders.mjs ${PORT} && export NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.test:unit: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node ../../scripts/run-with-timeout.mjs apiServerUnit --label "api-server test:unit" -- sh -c 'vitest run --shard=1/2 && vitest run --shard=2/2'
scripts.test:validation: VITEST_VALIDATION=1 node ../../scripts/run-with-timeout.mjs apiServerValidation --label "api-server test:validation" -- vitest run --config vitest.config.validation.ts
scripts.fixtures:regen: node src/__tests__/fixtures/generate.mjs && echo '' && echo 'Fixtures regenerated. Stage and commit the updated files:' && echo '  git add artifacts/api-server/src/__tests__/fixtures/' && echo "  git commit -m 'chore: regenerate fixtures'" && echo '' && echo 'To verify freshness (from repo root):' && echo '  bash artifacts/api-server/src/__tests__/fixtures/check-fixture-freshness.sh'
